packs.name: Kubernetes Baseline
packs.description: Guards against destructive kubectl and Helm operations: namespace deletion, prod-context changes, node disruption, and secret removal.

packs.name: Docker Baseline
packs.description: Guards high-risk Docker operations: privileged container runs, host filesystem mounts, system pruning, and image pushes.

packs.name: AWS Baseline
packs.description: Protects critical AWS infrastructure: guards S3 bucket deletion, IAM destructive changes, KMS key scheduling, CloudTrail tampering, and compute/database termination.

packs.name: Git Baseline
packs.description: Guards protected branches from force-pushes and unreviewed direct pushes. Guards against accidental hard resets, dangerous untracked-file removal, and credential exposure in commits.

packs.name: Secrets Baseline
packs.description: Comprehensive secret and credential hygiene: requires admin approval for secrets entering prompts and tool calls, redacts secrets in tool output, and requires admin approval before reading well-known credential files.

packs.name: Database Baseline
packs.description: Guards irreversible database operations: schema drops, privilege escalation, truncation, unqualified deletes, and direct prod database access.

packs.name: Terraform Baseline
packs.description: Guards infrastructure-as-code operations: gates apply, destroy, and state operations behind admin access request.

packs.name: Filesystem Baseline
packs.description: Guards the host filesystem: recursive root deletion, piping remote scripts to shell, block-device overwrites, and access to system credential files require admin approval.
